steps.title: Use the narrator's correction
steps.content: At first, the narrator thinks Caleb may want company. The key correction is that Caleb was actually desirous to avoid seafaring men.

steps.title: Connect motive to behavior
steps.content: Caleb looks through the curtain before entering and stays quiet when sailors are present. A and B say he seeks company or work, and C shifts the concern to other guests. The answer is D.
